name: hotmaps_task_2.7_load_profile_industry_iron_and_steel_generic
title: load_profile_industry_iron_and_steel_generic
description: In this repository the generic load profile for the sector industry and the subsector iron_and_steel, modelled as part of WP 2.7, is published

sources.name: [1] [TrustEE - Report on current status of Process heat in Europe: sectors, processes, geographical distribution, system layouts and energy sources](https://www.trust-ee.eu/files/otherfiles/0000/0008/TrustEE_D1_1.pdf) AEE Intec, Fraunhofer ISE, Reen AG, Universidade de Evora, 2016.
[2] [Comparative Analysis of Operating Hours and Working Times in the European Union] Delson, Bauer, Cette, Smith, 2009,Heidelberg: Physica-Verlag.

[4] [Bevlkerung und Erwebsttigkeit. Erwerbsbeteiligung der Bevlkerung Ergebnisse des Mikrozensus zumArbeitsmarkt.](https://www.destatis.de/DE/Publikationen/Thematisch/Arbeitsmarkt/Erwerbstaetige/ErwerbsbeteiligungBevoelkung2010410167004.pdf?__blob=publicationFile) Federal Statistical Office Germany, 2016, Fachserie 1 Reihe 4.1, checked on 30.01.18.
